products.name: Duolingo Max 12 Months Subscription
products.description: Duolingo Max annual access delivered by invitation to your existing Duolingo account.

features: Access to all Duolingo Max features.
metadata.info_box_text:
Your subscription is delivered directly to your Duolingo account.
At checkout, provide the email address linked to that account.
You will receive an invitation to join the Duolingo Max plan on the same account.
metadata.activation_guide:
During checkout, provide the email address linked to your Duolingo account.
Make sure the email is correct, since delivery is sent to that exact Duolingo account.
You will receive an invitation to join the Duolingo Max plan.
Open and accept the invite to activate access on your account.
